system.description: You crave unusual - taboo - things rather than good honest meat and drink: rusted metal, living creatures, vermin, effluvia, used clothing, beloved pets, etc. Next time you visit a haunt and attempt to refresh Blood or Mind stress, you must seek out this weirdness and indulge in it; otherwise you will be unable to refresh. Once you've sought out the weirdness, remove this fallout. This fallout can be upgraded into DARK CRAVINGS.[Ongoing]
